title: Domain-Specific Financial Large Language Models

notes: Audit only, no edits. Chapter is well-written and finance-first (strong on orientation, separation, pedagogy, progression) but fails the 90 gate on 8 dimensions, driven by (1) a stub paired notebook + no regenerable artifacts (reproducibility 55, code_figure 70), (2) verification debt on BloombergGPT/FinBERT/FinQA/FinBen/RahimikiaDrinkall numerics from arXiv-stub and SSRN @unpublished sources (citation_accuracy 82, NEEDS_EXTERNAL_VERIFICATION cap 89), (3) a shah2022flue bib stub note + liu2018 key/year mismatch (citation_hygiene 84), and (4) a self-correcting taxonomy that omits the encoder-decoder family on first statement (concept_ordering 87, completeness 89). correctness 86 from the epsilon-band execution-accuracy generalisation. BOOK_WIDE: 4 items (working-paper verification debt; shah2022flue stub; liu2018 key/year; stub-notebook pattern).
